metadata.description: Official PayIt2 plugin marketplace. AI-powered tools for fundraising campaign management, content automation, compliance, and donor engagement.

plugins.name: payit2-campaign-manager
plugins.description: AI-powered fundraising campaign manager. Create campaigns, generate content, engage donors, and optimize performance through conversation with Claude.

plugins.name: payit2-blog-agent
plugins.description: Autonomous blog agent that publishes SEO-optimized posts 2x per week targeting fundraising and legal defense keywords.

plugins.name: payit2-newsletter-agent
plugins.description: Autonomous weekly newsletter agent. Generates and distributes recurring newsletters to keep contributors and organizers engaged.

plugins.name: payit2-compliance-agent
plugins.description: Stripe AUP compliance screening, monitoring, and enforcement for fundraising campaigns.

plugins.name: payit2-lookalike-marketer
plugins.description: Multi-channel audience analysis and campaign generation. Analyzes successful campaigns and builds lookalike audiences across email, LinkedIn, and social.
